title: Minecraft Bedrock Biome Definition 1.21.110
description: Contains a description and components to define a Server Biome.

format_version.description: The 3-part schema version for parsing these biome settings.

minecraft:biome.title: Biome Definition
minecraft:biome.description: Contains a description and components to define a Server Biome.

description.title: Biome Description
description.description: Contains non-component settings for a Server Biome.

identifier.description: The name of the Server Biome, used by other features like the '/locate biome' command. Must match the name of a Biome defined by the game or a behavior pack.
